title: NTT DATA and NVIDIA bring enterprise AI factories to production scale
optimized_headline: NTT DATA and NVIDIA Launch Enterprise AI Factories: What’s the Impact?
raw_excerpt: NTT DATA has announced an initiative to deliver NVIDIA-powered platforms designed to give organisations a repeatable, production-ready model for scaling AI. The offering integrates NVIDIA’s GPU-accelerated computing and high-performance networking with NVIDIA AI Enterprise software, including NeMo and NIM Microservices, into a full-stack agentic AI platform that can be deployed in cloud and edge e
raw_body:
NTT DATA has announced an initiative to deliver NVIDIA-powered platforms designed to give organisations a repeatable, production-ready model for scaling AI. The offering integrates NVIDIA’s GPU-accelerated computing and high-performance networking with NVIDIA AI Enterprise software, including NeMo and NIM Microservices, into a full-stack agentic AI platform that can be deployed in cloud and edge environments. […]
The post NTT DATA and NVIDIA bring enterprise AI factories to production scale appeared first on AI News.
speedrun: NTT DATA has launched a new initiative to create NVIDIA-powered platforms for organizations, enabling them to scale their AI capabilities efficiently. This initiative combines NVIDIA’s advanced GPU computing and networking with AI Enterprise software like NeMo and NIM Microservices. The goal is to provide a repeatable, production-ready model that can be deployed in both cloud and edge environments. This matters now as businesses increasingly seek reliable ways to implement AI at scale.
why_it_matters: Organizations can quickly adopt AI technologies, enhancing their operational efficiency and decision-making capabilities.
This move signals a shift towards standardized AI solutions, potentially lowering costs and improving accessibility for various industries.

lenses.eli12: NTT DATA is teaming up with NVIDIA to help businesses use AI more effectively. They are creating platforms that make it easier for companies to implement AI solutions, kind of like providing a ready-to-use recipe for a complex dish. This is important because it allows everyday businesses to harness the power of AI without needing deep technical expertise.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this initiative could streamline the process of integrating AI into products. By leveraging NVIDIA’s technology, companies can reduce development time and costs, making AI solutions more accessible. It highlights the need for user-friendly platforms that enable rapid deployment of AI features.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, NTT DATA's platforms utilize NVIDIA’s GPU-accelerated computing and networking capabilities, along with AI Enterprise software like NeMo and NIM Microservices. This integration aims to create a robust, full-stack AI environment that can operate efficiently in both cloud and edge settings. The focus on repeatable models could enhance deployment consistency across various applications.
